ItacPersonItem.Notes: Perhaps Lodovico Alessi of Perugia? Accoring to Maylender Lessi (or Alessi) was secretary of the Academy, and edited a volume of poems when Bollani was prince of the Academy, in 1608.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
